name: Upstage (Solar)
pricing_notes: Solar Pro: $0.009/1K input, $0.009/1K output; Document Parse $0.01/page; Solar Mini cheaper

auth.notes: API key from Upstage Console; OpenAI-compatible Authorization: Bearer header

performance.notes: Solar Pro latency ~500ms TTFT; Document Parse OCR ~2-5s per page

agent_readiness.notes: Korean AI company with Solar LLM family. OpenAI-compatible API. Key differentiator: Document Parse API for high-accuracy OCR of PDFs/images (better than standard OCR for tables, diagrams). Solar Pro competes with GPT-4o on Korean and multilingual tasks. Groundedness Check API for RAG hallucination detection.

gotchas: Smaller ecosystem and community than OpenAI/Anthropic
Solar Pro pricing comparable to GPT-4o but smaller knowledge base
Document Parse is the clearest differentiator — Solar LLM is not clearly better than alternatives
Limited tool calling capabilities compared to frontier models
best_when: Document processing pipelines needing high-accuracy OCR (PDFs with tables, forms)
RAG pipelines needing Groundedness Check for hallucination detection
Multilingual applications requiring strong Korean/Asian language support
avoid_when: English-only LLM tasks (GPT-4o, Claude better quality/ecosystem)
Code generation (limited benchmark performance vs frontier models)
summary: Upstage offers Solar LLM models (OpenAI API-compatible) with strong Korean/multilingual performance, plus a Document Parse API for high-accuracy OCR of PDFs and images including tables and diagrams. The Document Parse is the clearest differentiation; Solar LLM competes with mid-tier models. Groundedness Check API helps detect RAG hallucinations. Best for Korean-language apps or document-heavy pipelines.
